title: Debounced Search Input

statement.markdown:
## Debounced Search Input & Throttled Action

Build a search input field that displays the debounced query value only after 300ms of inactivity. Additionally, implement an action button that is throttled to increment a click counter at most once every 1000ms.

### Requirements:
1. **Debounce Output**: Input key-events should update the debounced value text container after exactly 300ms of inactivity.
2. **Throttle Button**: Fast clicking on the action button should only register one counter increment per 1000ms window.
3. **DOM Updates**: Ensure correct selector selection and output rendering.

constraints: Must implement custom debounce and throttle timer logic
Do not use third-party libraries like Lodash

starterCode.html:
Debounced Value: -
Successful Submissions: 0

gradingCriteria.description: Verify input debounces value update and does not trigger prematurely.
Verify submission click increments are throttled to once per second.
